adminSupport.bannerSubtitle: User tickets (Отзыв / Запрос) — reply in the internal group to answer in DM.
adminSupport.title: Telegram support (admin)
adminSupport.subtitle: Open the bot, pricing link, and operator checklist.
adminSupport.actionsSub: Same link as Enterprise on the pricing page.
adminSupport.operatorSub: Human replies only — no AI in this flow.
adminSupport.step1: The user chooses Отзыв or Запрос in the bot and sends a message.
adminSupport.step2: The ticket appears in your Telegram support group (TELEGRAM_SUPPORT_GROUP_ID on the backend).
adminSupport.step3: Reply to the bot’s ticket message — your reply is copied to the user’s chat.
adminSupport.docsRepo: Full setup: docs/TELEGRAM_BOT_SETUP.md in the repository.

compare.title: Model Comparison
compare.subtitle: Compare current model with retrained version
compare.trainingHint: Training new model for comparison... This may take a few seconds.
compare.noCurrentModel: No cached model — showing new model only

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Manage users, roles, and access
users.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to deactivate this user?
users.cantEditSelf: Cannot modify your own admin status

subscription.heroHeadline: Pick the plan that fits your team
subscription.plansSubtitle: Start free and scale when you need more. Payment integration is coming soon.
subscription.featFree4: AI chat: Random Forest model included
subscription.featFree5: Charts and history for core SKUs
subscription.featFree6: Clear upgrade path when you need more capacity
subscription.starterFootnote: No credit card required to explore Starter.
subscription.starterActive: You're on the Free plan. Taking you to the app…
subscription.featPro4: AI chat: LightGBM and XGBoost models unlocked
subscription.featPro5: Confidence bands and richer forecast exports
subscription.featPro6: Higher usage limits as billing rolls out
subscription.proTagline: For teams that forecast every week
subscription.proFootnote: You’ll get early access when payments launch.
subscription.enterpriseTagline: For organizations with compliance and scale needs
subscription.enterpriseFootnote: We’ll propose SLA targets after scoping your stack.
subscription.compareNote: Exact numeric limits will appear here once billing is live.
subscription.billingSoon: Billing is almost ready — sign up and we’ll notify you.
subscription.proActiveTagline: This is your current plan — all Pro features are unlocked.
subscription.proActiveFootnote: Need Enterprise or higher limits? Check the card on the right or contact us.
subscription.telegramSupportMissing: Telegram support link is not configured. Set VITE_TELEGRAM_SUPPORT_URL in the frontend env.

payment.title: Checkout
payment.subtitleDemo: Demo payment — no real charges. Card details are not stored.
payment.alreadyPremium: You already have premium access. Paying again will just refresh your demo status.
payment.notFoundHint: Payment API not found (404). Run the backend or redeploy — POST /subscription/mock-checkout or /auth/mock-subscribe must exist.

landing.title: Forecast AI
landing.subtitle: Demand Forecasting Platform
landing.description: Transform your supply chain with intelligent, explainable forecasting.

forecast.title: Forecast
forecast.description: AI predicts demand with 94% accuracy using neural networks

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.description: Real-time analytics of market trends and consumer behavior

optimization.title: Optimization
optimization.description: Reduce inventory costs by 30% with smart warehouse management

dialog.title: Dialog
dialog.description: Ask questions in natural language, get instant answers

predict.title: Predict the Future
predict.description: Our neural networks analyze historical data, market trends, and external factors to forecast demand with unprecedented accuracy.

understand.title: Understand the Why
understand.description: Explainable AI breaks down each forecast into understandable, actionable factors.

optimize.title: Optimize Operations
optimize.description: Reduce costs, minimize waste, and maximize efficiency with intelligent inventory management.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to access the dashboard
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to get started
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters

onboarding.replayHint: Open the welcome steps again (saved per account).
onboarding.replayToast: Tour unlocked — it should appear shortly.

spotlight.newChatBody: Use New chat whenever you want a clean context. Your recent conversations stay in the list below.
spotlight.recentChatsBody: Jump back to an earlier thread from here. Each line is a saved conversation with the assistant.
spotlight.settingsBody: Open Settings to adjust language and other options. You can replay this tour from Settings anytime.
spotlight.subscriptionBody: Check your plan or upgrade here. PRO unlocks extra models and capabilities in chat.
spotlight.profileBody: Tap your initials for the profile page, or use the arrow to log out securely.
spotlight.composerBody: Type a question in any language, pick a model when available, then send. Voice input works if your browser allows the microphone.
spotlight.suggestionsBody: These chips pre-fill common questions — tap one to speed up your first message.

welcome.title: Welcome to the platform
welcome.body: You are signed in. This short tour highlights the essentials so you can start working with forecasts and AI tools confidently.

home.bodyAdmin: The dashboard is your starting point: KPIs, trends, and quick access to forecasts, reports, and data tools.
home.bodyUser: The main page is the AI chat: ask questions about products, demand, and trends in everyday language.

features.bodyAdmin: Open Forecast to build charts and scenarios, browse Reports, manage the product table, upload new data, and compare models when you need deeper analysis.
features.bodyUser: Type a clear question, refer to a product or category if you can, and use follow-ups to narrow the reply. The assistant uses your account context and history.

settings.title: Profile & preferences
settings.bodyAdmin: Your account badge and language live in the sidebar. Log out from the bottom of the sidebar when you are done.
settings.bodyUser: Open your profile from the chat menu to view your account. Language switches live in the sidebar; use logout when you finish.

done.title: You are ready
done.body: You can reopen sections from the sidebar anytime. Press “Got it” to save this tour and hide it for your account.

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm your AI assistant for demand forecasting.
chat.subscriptionProHint: PRO subscription is active — open plans
chat.aiDisclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Verify important information.
chat.speechNotSupported: Speech recognition is not supported in your browser
